title: monardella linoides var. viminea
intro: Monardella linoides var. viminea, also known as Purple Sage, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Purple Sage include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Purple Sage can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in culinary applications due to its distinctive flavor and aroma.
